## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Jason Gong (growthx.ai) and Caleb Eom (CalebWritesCode) for AI education content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX aims to revolutionize knowledge work, currently running an agency with 50% AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Caleb creates AI explainer content, aspiring to be an independent AI journalist/columnist](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Potential collaboration on LLM basics course for non-technical audience in GrowthX community](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Caleb prefers maintaining autonomy over content creation, open to contract work](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Operations and Vision

  - [Running an agency serving as outsourced growth department for tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [50% AI workflows in background, aiming to productize repeatable parts](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Building community through workshops, courses, and YouTube content](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Target audience: non-engineer knowledge workers (marketing, sales, finance, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Long-term vision: changing knowledge work infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### Caleb's Content Creation and Goals

  - [Creates Khan Academy-style visuals for AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Balances technical and non-technical content (50/50 split)](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Aspires to be an independent AI journalist/columnist](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Prioritizes presenting unbiased, objective information](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Started full-time content creation \~1 month ago, still evolving strategy](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [LLM basics course for non-technical audience in GrowthX community](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Topics: context engineering, prompt engineering, AI industry overview](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Focus on practical applications rather than deep technical details](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Possible work with Surge AI (GrowthX client) on higher-end data labeling content](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### Content Creation Process and Compensation

  - [Caleb charges per minute of final video output](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Includes research, scripting, editing, and visual work](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Prefers projects with creative autonomy](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Two contract models: full creative control vs. guided topics](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Future Possibilities

  - [Exploring long-term collaboration potential](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Caleb maintaining YouTube channel while potentially working with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Emphasis on maintaining content integrity and autonomy](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Caleb to send scope of work and rates to Jason](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Jason to provide more detailed information on desired content output](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for async communication](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Caleb to review GrowthX materials and consider alignment](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Explore initial collaboration on LLM basics course for GrowthX community](https://fathom.video/share/FdScr479w8mU6v11pNSuXxFBz-SAigVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
